AppointmentCTA.headline: Your health doesn't wait.
AppointmentCTA.description: Same-day appointments available for emergencies. Use the form or call us directly — our care coordinators respond in less than 2 minutes.
AppointmentCTA.noPayment: No payment required. Our team will confirm availability within 30 minutes.
AppointmentCTA.submittedDesc: Our care coordinator will call you within 30 minutes to confirm your appointment time.

consultance.label: Consultancy and training in the biomedical field

options.formation_util_equip: Training in the use of biomedical equipment
options.formation_maint_equip: Training in the maintenance of biomedical equipment
options.formation_psa: Training in the use, maintenance, and management of oxygen production plants (PSA)

Layout.title: CEBM — Trusted Care for the Whole Family
Layout.description: CEBM offers primary care, diagnostics, specialized consultations, and preventive health services for patients of all ages in a welcoming clinic.

HeroSection.headline: Caring Care,
HeroSection.description: The Maombi Biomedical Expertise Center offers you daily medical consultations, an advanced diagnostic technical platform, as well as specialized biomedical services under one roof, so that your family never waits for the care they deserve.

specialized.title: Specialized Services
specialized.subtitle: BIOMEDICAL METROLOGY AND MAINTENANCE, CONSULTANCY AND TRAINING, RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT

ServicesSection.headline: Strengthening Health
ServicesSection.description: Four areas of biomedical activity gathered under one roof, with optimal coordination between services.

consultation.title: Medical Consultation and Diagnostic Services
consultation.description: Comprehensive medical consultations and advanced diagnostic services including imaging, laboratory analysis, and pathology. Results available within hours for most exams.
details: Medical imaging: Digital Radiography, Digital Mammography, 3D/4D Ultrasound (Cardiac and vascular ultrasounds, Specialized ultrasounds by organ/system, Obstetrical and Pediatric Ultrasounds)
Laboratory: Hematology, Biochemistry, Bacteriology, Parasitology, Immunology, Hormonology, …
Electrodiagnostics: Standard ECG, Stress ECG, EMG, Standard EEG, Prolonged video EEG (Telemetry)

metrologie.title: Biomedical Metrology and Maintenance
metrologie.description: Calibration, verification, and maintenance of biomedical equipment according to international standards to ensure the accuracy and reliability of medical devices.

consultance.title: Biomedical Consultancy and Training
consultance.description: Expert support and specialized training programs in biomedical engineering for healthcare professionals and medical facilities.
details: Training in the use of biomedical equipment
Training in the maintenance of biomedical equipment
Training in the use, maintenance, and management of oxygen production plants (PSA)

recherche.title: Biomedical Research and Development
recherche.description: Innovative research projects and development of cutting-edge biomedical solutions to improve clinical practices and health technologies.

AboutSection.description: To become a pole of technological and human excellence, offering ultra-precise diagnostics to detect complex pathologies early, optimize therapeutic strategies and personalize patient care, all in a human and accessible environment.

evidence.title: Evidence-Based Medicine
evidence.body: Every diagnosis and treatment plan follows current clinical guidelines without guesswork, without unnecessary exams.

coordinated.title: Coordinated Care
coordinated.body: Your attending physician coordinates with specialists, laboratories, and pharmacies so you never have to repeat your story.

lucy.quote: I have been bringing my whole family to Maombi Biomedical Expertise Center for three years. The pediatricians are patient and thorough — my children now look forward to their consultations.

jacques.quote: After my heart attack, the cardiology team coordinated everything seamlessly — from the emergency transfer to my follow-up stress test. I never felt lost in the system.

selengo.quote: Same-day diagnostics saved me weeks of anxiety. Blood results in less than four hours, and my doctor called me personally to explain everything.
